subject: Sports
title: Ali vs Frazier: The Fight of the Century
description: One-minute skill: Ali vs Frazier: The Fight of the Century.

hook.text: Two undefeated heavyweight champions. One fight to decide the greatest boxer alive. March 8, 1971.

buildup.text: Ali was brash, political, and beloved by the anti-war movement. Frazier was blue-collar and relentless.

discovery.text: Frazier knocked Ali down in the 15th round and won by decision. It was Ali's first professional loss.

twist.text: Ali mocked Frazier mercilessly before the fight, calling him 'ugly' and a 'gorilla.' The cruelty haunted Frazier for life.

climax.text: They fought twice more, including the brutal 'Thrilla in Manila.' Both men were never the same after.

punchline.text: The greatest rivalry in boxing left both champions permanently damaged.

quiz.question: Who won the first Ali vs Frazier fight?
